mission.title: jaeger: collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change
mission.description: collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current jaeger deployment
steps.description:
Verify your jaeger version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
helm list -n observability 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working jaeger installation.

steps.title: Review jaeger configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger
```
## Requirement - what kind of business use case are you trying to solve?

It should be possible to change the sampling strategies without restarting the collector.

steps.title: Apply the fix for collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change
steps.description:
## Which problem is this PR solving?
- Add support for dynamically reloading sampling strategies, resolves #1058 

## Short description of the changes
- Create new viper instance to watch changes to the sampling strategies file
- Wrap the sampling strategy store in a `RWMutex` for concurrent access.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "collector: reload sampling strategies on file content change" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Which problem is this PR solving?
- Add support for dynamically reloading sampling strategies, resolves #1058 

## Short description of the changes
- Create new viper instance to watch changes to the sampling strategies file
- Wrap the sampling strategy store in a `RWMutex` for concurrent access.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with jaeger installed or the issue environment reproducible.
